item.title: Are Waterproof Sneakers Worth It? (2026)
item.description: The idea of having warm, dry feet on your wet, snowy run is appealing. But you might not like the trade-offs.

item.title: Best Apple 3-in-1 Wireless Travel Chargers (2026), Tested and Reviewed
item.description: Keep your trio of Apple gadgets fully charged wherever you are with these compact folding travel chargers.

item.title: How Ilia Malinin Revolutionized Figure Skating with His Quadruple Axel
item.description: On Friday, the US Olympic skater known as the “Quad God” will compete in his last event of the 2026 Winter Games. Everyone will be watching to see if ...

item.title: Elehear Delight Hearing Aids Review: Good Fit, Poor Sound
item.description: These new in-the-ear aids look great, but quality hearing support just isn’t there.

item.title: LGBTQ+ Athletes Are Front and Center at the 2026 Winter Olympic Games
item.description: Nearly 50 out LGBTQ+ Olympians are participating in events throughout the Winter Games—even as their rights to speak and compete are under attack.
